task: place brown chip bag into bottom drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A brown chip bag is on a gray countertop. A white bowl is on the left, and a tube of toothpaste is on the right. The chip bag is flexible and has a printed design. The goal is to place it into the bottom drawer. The drawer is closed and has a handle. STRATEGY - First, grasp the chip bag from its body to avoid tearing. Then, transport it to the drawer. Next, pull the drawer open to create space. Finally, place the chip bag inside the drawer and push the drawer closed. Failure modes include dropping the chip bag, not opening the drawer, or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the chip bag body; Step 2 grasp the chip bag body; Step 3 transport to the drawer; Step 4 pull the drawer handle; Step 5 place inside the drawer; Step 6 push the drawer handle.

**Goal:** inside(brown_chip_bag, bottom_drawer); closed(bottom_drawer)
**Scene:** brown_chip_bag, white_bowl, toothpaste_tube, countertop, bottom_drawer
**Step 1:** reach(brown_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the brown chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, brown_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, brown_chip_bag) < 0.03
**Step 2:** grasp(brown_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the brown chip bag
  contact: holding(brown_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(brown_chip_bag)
**Step 3:** transport(brown_chip_bag -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the bottom drawer
  spatial: above(brown_chip_bag, bottom_drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(brown_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(brown_chip_bag, bottom_drawer, 0.05)
**Step 4:** pull(bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the bottom drawer
  contact: holding(bottom_drawer) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(bottom_drawer)
**Step 5:** place(brown_chip_bag -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the bottom drawer
  contact: surface_contact(brown_chip_bag, bottom_drawer) [completion]; released(brown_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(brown_chip_bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(brown_chip_bag, bottom_drawer) AND released(brown_chip_bag)
**Step 6:** push(bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the bottom drawer
  contact: holding(bottom_drawer) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: closed(bottom_drawer)
<END_OF_PLAN>

the body of the brown chip bag
an empty area inside the bottom drawer
the handle of the bottom drawer

the handle of the bottom drawer
